title: GSTR-1 (Outward Supplies)
description: Monthly return for outward supplies - details of all sales transactions
penalty: Rs. 50/day for CGST + Rs. 50/day for SGST (max Rs. 10,000 total)

title: GSTR-3B (Summary Return)
description: Monthly summary return with self-assessed tax payment
penalty: Rs. 50/day for CGST + Rs. 50/day for SGST (max Rs. 10,000) + 18% p.a. interest on tax due

title: GST Payment
description: Monthly GST liability payment through Electronic Cash/Credit Ledger
penalty: 18% p.a. interest on delayed payment; additional penalty up to 10% of tax under Section 73/74

title: GSTR-9 (Annual Return)
description: Annual consolidated return for all GST registered taxpayers (turnover > Rs. 2 crore)
penalty: Rs. 200/day (Rs. 100 CGST + Rs. 100 SGST) subject to max 0.50% of turnover

title: GSTR-9C (Reconciliation Statement)
description: Self-certified reconciliation statement for taxpayers with turnover exceeding Rs. 5 crore
penalty: Rs. 200/day subject to max 0.50% of turnover in the State/UT
law_reference: Section 44 read with Rule 80 of CGST Rules

title: GST TDS Payment & Return (GSTR-7)
description: Monthly GST TDS deduction payment and return for government entities and specified persons
penalty: Rs. 50/day (max Rs. 10,000) + 18% interest + late fee Rs. 200/day

title: AOC-4 (Financial Statements)
description: Filing of financial statements with Registrar - within 30 days from AGM
penalty: Rs. 100/day per default (company) + Rs. 100/day per default (director); max Rs. 10 lakh for company

title: MGT-7/MGT-7A (Annual Return)
description: Annual return filing - within 60 days from AGM. MGT-7A for small companies/OPC
penalty: Rs. 100/day per default (company) + Rs. 100/day per default (director); prosecution possible

title: ADT-1 (Auditor Appointment)
description: Intimation of auditor appointment to ROC within 15 days of AGM
penalty: Company: Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 5 lakh; Every officer in default: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1 lakh

title: DIR-3 KYC (Director KYC)
description: Annual KYC verification for all directors holding DIN - due 30th September yearly
penalty: Rs. 5,000 for late filing; DIN marked as 'Deactivated due to non-filing of DIR-3 KYC'
law_reference: Rule 12A of Companies (Appointment and Qualification of Directors) Rules, 2014

title: INC-20A (Business Commencement)
description: Declaration for commencement of business - within 180 days from incorporation
penalty: Rs. 50,000 for company; Rs. 1,000/day for every officer (max Rs. 1 lakh); Company may be struck off

title: MSME Form-1 (MSME Outstanding)
description: Half-yearly return of outstanding payments to MSME suppliers
penalty: Rs. 20,000 + Rs. 1,000/day of continuing default (max Rs. 3 lakh)
law_reference: Section 405 of Companies Act, 2013 read with MSMED Act

title: DPT-3 (Return of Deposits)
description: Annual return of deposits/outstanding loans not considered deposits
penalty: Company: Rs. 1 crore to Rs. 10 crore or twice the deposit; Officer: Rs. 25 lakh to Rs. 2 crore + imprisonment up to 7 years

title: TDS Payment
description: Monthly TDS payment for tax deducted - 7th of next month (30th April for March)
penalty: Interest: 1% per month from date of deduction to deposit; 1.5% per month from due date of deposit

title: TDS Return Q1 (Form 24Q/26Q)
description: Quarterly TDS return for deductions made during April to June
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day under Section 234E (max = TDS amount); Penalty: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 under Section 271H

title: TDS Return Q2 (Form 24Q/26Q)
description: Quarterly TDS return for deductions made during July to September
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day under Section 234E (max = TDS amount); Penalty: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 under Section 271H

title: TDS Return Q3 (Form 24Q/26Q)
description: Quarterly TDS return for deductions made during October to December
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day under Section 234E (max = TDS amount); Penalty: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 under Section 271H

title: TDS Return Q4 (Form 24Q/26Q)
description: Quarterly TDS return for deductions made during January to March
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 200/day under Section 234E (max = TDS amount); Penalty: Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 under Section 271H

title: Form 16/16A Q1 (TDS Certificate)
description: TDS Certificate to deductees for Q1 - within 15 days from filing due date
penalty: Rs. 100/day per certificate per deductee (max = TDS amount on that certificate)

title: Form 16 (Annual TDS Certificate)
description: Annual TDS certificate for salary deductions - due 15th June
penalty: Rs. 100/day per certificate per employee; Director can be prosecuted

title: PF Payment
description: Monthly Provident Fund contribution remittance to EPFO - due 15th of next month
penalty: Interest: 12% p.a. for 0-2 months, 5% additional for 2-4 months, 25% additional for 4-6 months; Damages up to 100% of arrears

title: PF ECR Filing
description: Monthly Electronic Challan cum Return filing for PF contributions
penalty: Damages as per EPFO damage schedule; Criminal prosecution possible under Section 14

title: ESI Payment
description: Monthly ESI contribution remittance to ESIC - due 15th of next month
penalty: Simple interest @ 12% p.a.; Damages up to 25% of arrears; Prosecution and imprisonment possible

title: ESI Half-Yearly Return
description: Half-yearly return of ESI contributions (Apr-Sep: Nov 12, Oct-Mar: May 12)
penalty: Fine up to Rs. 5,000; Imprisonment up to 1 year for repeated default

title: Professional Tax Payment
description: Monthly Professional Tax payment (varies by state - typically due by 20th/30th)
penalty: Varies by state: typically 10-25% of tax due as penalty + interest @ 1-2% per month
law_reference: State Professional Tax Acts (varies by state)

title: Professional Tax Annual Return
description: Annual Professional Tax return (varies by state)
penalty: Varies by state; Late filing fee + penalty for incorrect returns
law_reference: State Professional Tax Acts (varies by state)

title: Labour Welfare Fund
description: Half-yearly Labour Welfare Fund contribution (varies by state)
penalty: Varies by state: Rs. 500 to Rs. 5,000 + interest

title: Advance Tax - 1st Instalment
description: First instalment of advance tax (minimum 15% of estimated tax liability)
penalty: Interest @ 1% per month under Section 234B (shortfall) and 234C (deferment)

title: Advance Tax - 2nd Instalment
description: Second instalment of advance tax (cumulative 45% of estimated tax liability)
penalty: Interest @ 1% per month under Section 234B (shortfall) and 234C (deferment)

title: Advance Tax - 3rd Instalment
description: Third instalment of advance tax (cumulative 75% of estimated tax liability)
penalty: Interest @ 1% per month under Section 234B (shortfall) and 234C (deferment)

title: Advance Tax - 4th Instalment
description: Final instalment of advance tax (100% of estimated tax liability)
penalty: Interest @ 1% per month under Section 234B (shortfall) and 234C (deferment)

title: ITR Filing (Non-Audit Cases)
description: Income tax return filing for individuals and entities not requiring audit
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 5,000 (Rs. 1,000 if income below Rs. 5 lakh) under Section 234F; Interest under 234A

title: ITR Filing (Audit Cases)
description: Income tax return filing for entities requiring tax audit under Section 44AB
penalty: Late fee: Rs. 5,000 under Section 234F; Interest under 234A; Penalty for non-audit under 271B

title: Tax Audit Report (Form 3CA/3CB-3CD)
description: Tax audit report to be filed before ITR due date
penalty: Penalty: 0.5% of turnover or Rs. 1,50,000, whichever is less, under Section 271B

title: Transfer Pricing Report (Form 3CEB)
description: Transfer pricing audit report for international/specified domestic transactions
penalty: Penalty: Rs. 1,00,000 for non-compliance under Section 271BA

title: Board Meeting - Q1
description: Quarterly board meeting (minimum 4 per year, gap not exceeding 120 days)
penalty: Company: Rs. 25,000 min; Officer in default: Rs. 5,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 under Section 173(4)

title: Board Meeting - Q2
description: Quarterly board meeting (minimum 4 per year, gap not exceeding 120 days)
penalty: Company: Rs. 25,000 min; Officer in default: Rs. 5,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 under Section 173(4)

title: Board Meeting - Q3
description: Quarterly board meeting (minimum 4 per year, gap not exceeding 120 days)
penalty: Company: Rs. 25,000 min; Officer in default: Rs. 5,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 under Section 173(4)

title: Board Meeting - Q4
description: Quarterly board meeting (minimum 4 per year, gap not exceeding 120 days)
penalty: Company: Rs. 25,000 min; Officer in default: Rs. 5,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 under Section 173(4)

title: Annual General Meeting (AGM)
description: AGM must be held within 6 months from end of financial year (by 30th September)
penalty: Company: Rs. 1 lakh (Rs. 5 lakh for continuing default); Every officer: Rs. 50,000 (Rs. 2.5 lakh for continuing)

title: Statutory Audit Completion
description: Completion of statutory audit and adoption of accounts in board meeting before AGM
penalty: Non-adoption leads to filing issues; Qualification/adverse opinion affects company reputation
